author: gb9t
content: Iteration 23: intel/i40e.md committed (8648b2f, 229 lines). Intel XL710/XXV710/X710/X722 40/25G NIC family (Fortville). ~50K LOC. Bridges from ixgbe-era mailbox SR-IOV to modern AdminQ + VirtChnl pattern shared with ice + iavf. Headline features: AdminQ DMA-based FW interface, VSI abstraction, HMC Host Memory Cache, VirtChnl SR-IOV, DDP custom parser profiles, RDMA client interface. Rust translation: shared intel-adminq + virtchnl-msg crates consumed by i40e + ice + iavf. Grsec: VirtChnl PF dispatcher SR-IOV-escape surface — opcode+size allowlists, VF resource caps strict, DDP profile Intel-signature mandatory + size capped, HMC ctx write validation, client-API single-instance. Intel NIC family complete: ixgbe(10G) + i40e(40G) + ice(100G existing). 23 docs / ~1.54M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/intel/iavf — Intel Adaptive VF (the VF-side driver running in KVM/QEMU guests, shared across i40e + ice PFs).
